summary: Both reviewers verified all run_1 blockers are structurally fixed, not band-aided. Backend LGTM: B1 (SESSION_SECRET centralized in api/_session.ts with fail-closed prod guard), B2 (login-scoped cache keys + clearMemCache on logout), B3 (scope reduced to read:user), B4 (password moved from URL to POST body, CORS scoped to GET). Security LGTM: S1 (password never in URL/Referer), S2 (crypto.randomBytes state), S4 (logout cookie attrs match login exactly). Only cosmetic 🔵 findings remain (dead code in share/_lib.ts, cd typo in EmptyOnboarding command, substring error matching). The 4 openIssues flagged by implementer are accepted as documented debt — none escalate to 🔴.
